rdBoundary.consumeAs: Research vocabulary and future proof input reference only. FlowChain Local Alpha object IDs are Keccak ABI typed hashes from this package.
rdBoundary.operatorVaultBoundary: Local Alpha signing keys are deterministic no-value test keys. Operator vault policy is a boundary document, not a wallet custody or value-bearing claim.

operator.note: Deterministic no-value local test key. Do not fund or reuse outside fixtures.
